E:\CMake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\gtest_capi_samples.dir/objects.a
E:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\gtest_capi_samples.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\gtest_capi_samples.dir\objects1.rsp
E:\msys64\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -shared -o libgtest_capi_samples.dll -Wl,--out-implib,libgtest_capi_samples.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\gtest_capi_samples.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\gtest_capi_samples.dir\linkLibs.rsp
